tools.name: admin-backend-status
tools.description: Get current status of the Teros backend including uptime, memory usage, process info, and number of running MCAs.

tools.name: admin-restart-backend
tools.description: Restart the Teros backend server. This will gracefully shutdown all MCA processes and restart the backend. Use with caution - this will temporarily interrupt service.

confirm.description: Confirmation flag - must be true to proceed with restart

tools.name: admin-sync
tools.description: Sync MCAs, models, and tools from filesystem to database. Run this after adding or modifying MCAs.
